tool_args.label: Farebox Recovery Ratio Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox recovery ratio has a long-term focus. It includes costs that are not funded in the current year, except in an accounting-ledger sense, but are, in effect, passed on to future years. Those costs include depreciation and interest on long-term debt.

payload.claim_text: Farebox recovery ratio has a long-term focus. It includes costs that are not funded in the current year, except in an accounting-ledger sense, but are, in effect, passed on to future years. Those costs include depreciation and interest on long-term debt.
payload.subject: farebox recovery ratio
payload.description: Defines farebox recovery ratio and its long-term focus

tool_args.label: Approximately 20% of MTA costs not recovered from current revenues
tool_args.raw_text: Approximately 20% (and sometimes more) of MTA costs are not recovered in the current year from farebox revenues, other operating revenues or subsidies.

payload.claim_text: Approximately 20% (and sometimes more) of MTA costs are not recovered in the current year from farebox revenues, other operating revenues or subsidies.
payload.subject: MTA costs not recovered in current year
payload.description: Statement about the portion of MTA costs not recovered in the current year

tool_args.label: Farebox Operating Ratio Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox operating ratio focuses on Agency operating financial performance. It reflects the way MTA meets its statutory and bond-covenant budget-balancing requirements, and it excludes certain costs that are not subject to Agency control, but are provided centrally by the MTA.

payload.claim_text: Farebox operating ratio focuses on Agency operating financial performance. It reflects the way MTA meets its statutory and bond-covenant budget-balancing requirements, and it excludes certain costs that are not subject to Agency control, but are provided centrally by the MTA.
payload.subject: farebox operating ratio
payload.description: Defines farebox operating ratio and its focus

tool_args.label: Revised methodology for LIRR and MNR ratios in committee materials
tool_args.raw_text: In the agenda materials for the Meeting of the Metro-North and Long Island Committees, the calculations of the farebox operating and recovery ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis. Those statistics, which are included in the respective financial and ridership reports of both Agencies, differ from the statistics presented in this table.

payload.claim_text: In the agenda materials for the Meeting of the Metro-North and Long Island Committees, the calculations of the farebox operating and recovery ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis.
payload.subject: farebox ratio methodology
payload.description: Note about revised methodology used in committee materials for LIRR and MNR
